## Executive Summary (1-Minute Read)

|--------|-------|--------|

| **Project Completion** | {X}% | {Ahead/On Schedule/Behind} |
| **Budget Variance** | {+/- X}% | {Within Budget/Over Budget/Under Budget} |
| **Timeline Variance** | {+/- X weeks} | {On Target/Delayed/Early} |
| **Quality Status** | {X}% acceptance rate | 🟢/🟡/🔴 |
| **Risk Level** | {Low/Medium/High/Critical} | Status trend |

**Key Insight**: {1 sentence summarizing the most important finding}

**Recommended Action**: {What decision/approval is needed from leadership?}

## Go/No-Go Assessment

### Current Decision Gate

**Readiness Checklist**:
- ☑ Acceptance criteria met ({X}% complete)
- ☑ Quality gates passed ({X}% of tests passing)
- ☑ Security review approved ({Status})
- ☑ Performance benchmarks validated ({Status})
- ☑ Compliance signed off ({Status})
- ☑ Stakeholder approval obtained ({Status})
- ☑ Rollback plan documented and tested ({Status})
- ☑ Operations team trained ({Status})
